title: Widowmaker (disambiguation)
content:
'''Widowmaker''' could refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Widowmaker (maneuver)|Widowmaker]]''', a [[starfighter]] maneuver.
*'''''[[Widowmaker (racer)|Widowmaker]]''''', a racer configured like a podracer owned by Sebulba

==Legends==
*'''''[[Widowmaker (frigate)|Widowmaker]]''''', a frigate.
*'''[[Widowmaker (blaster)|Widowmaker]]''', a type of blaster.
*'''[[Jer'usk|Widowmaker]]''', a species of fish.
*'''[[Widowmaker (plant)|Widowmaker]]''', a species of plant.

{{Disambig}}
